title: Merger and consolidation
doc_html:
§1141.  Merger and consolidation

Professional psychology corporations may be merged into or consolidated only with other professional psychology corporations.  

Added by Acts 1980, No. 523, §1.

§1141.  Merger and consolidation
Professional psychology corporations may be merged into or consolidated only with other professional psychology corporations.
